errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint:

name: get_hiring_signal
description: Bitcoin/crypto-infra hiring velocity: open roles + 30/90-day deltas from live ATS boards.

name: get_sovereign_reserves
description: Sovereign Bitcoin holdings, ranked. Filter by country or tier (1 = largest holders).

name: get_treasury_holdings
description: Corporate Bitcoin treasury holdings: total BTC held by public companies + top holders.

name: get_etf_flows
description: Spot Bitcoin ETF net flows (latest day + trailing 5/30-day) — institutional demand.

name: get_network_signal
description: Bitcoin network hashrate level and 30/90-day trend (miner conviction / security).

name: get_daily_brew
description: Today's machine-readable signal digest (the CoinBucha Daily Brew).
